qualities-catalog.description: Catalog of positive qualities from Run Faster

rows.name: Adrenaline Surge
rows.description: Act first in first Initiative Pass of a new combat, regardless of Initiative Score. If multiple characters have this or Seize the Initiative, act in Initiative Score order.
rows.restrictions: Does not allow Surprised characters to act first in ambush.

rows.name: Animal Empathy
rows.description: +2 dice pool modifier for all tests involving influence or control of an animal (including riding), including Awakened species.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Black Market Pipeline
rows.description: Choose one contact and one merchandise category at creation. Purchases: 10% price reduction, +2 Availability Test modifier. Sales: (7% x Loyalty) of original value instead of 5%.
rows.restrictions: Contact must be appropriate to the chosen category.

rows.name: Born Rich
rows.description: May trade up to 40 Karma for nuyen at 2,000 nuyen/Karma (up to 80,000 nuyen) instead of normal 10 Karma limit.
rows.restrictions: Character creation only.

rows.name: City Slicker
rows.description: +1 dice pool modifier for all Outdoors skill group tests in urban environments. -1 dice pool modifier to Perception and Survival Tests in non-urban environments.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: College Education
rows.description: At creation: buy Academic Knowledge skills at half price (rounded up). Post-creation: Academic Knowledge ranks 3+ get 1 Karma cost reduction per rank.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Common Sense
rows.description: GM warns before foolish actions. Max warnings per session = character's Edge rating.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Daredevil
rows.description: Regain 2 points of Edge instead of 1 when performing exceptionally daring actions (GM discretion).
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Digital Doppelganger
rows.description: +2 threshold for Matrix Searches tracking the character on this ID. Digital identity cross-linked with someone else's.
rows.restrictions: Requires SINner quality. Must be linked to a particular SIN.

rows.name: Disgraced
rows.description: +2 dice pool modifier to intimidate criminals. Treated as Prejudiced in Etiquette Tests with upright citizens.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Erased
rows.description: Matrix searches find nothing. Legwork only via word-of-mouth. Public Awareness cannot exceed 1. Cannot maintain Lifestyle above Middle. Cannot use fake SIN/licenses for more than 3 months.
rows.restrictions: High Lifestyle requires a month of Low or lower afterward.

rows.name: Fame (Local)
rows.description: Select a sprawl. +1 Social Limit, +1 Social Skill modifier vs those who know. PA +2. Day Job: income x2.
rows.restrictions: Requires SINner or Rating 3 fake SIN. Identified by Intuition+Logic (2) in home sprawl, (1) outside.

rows.name: Fame (National)
rows.description: Select a nation and sprawl. In sprawl: +1 Social Limit, +2 Social Skill. In nation: +2 Social Limit, +1 Social Skill. PA +3. Day Job: income x4, +10% workload.
rows.restrictions: Requires SINner or Rating 3 fake SIN. Requires 4+ ranks in nation's native language.

rows.name: Fame (Megacorporate)
rows.description: Choose megacorp, sprawl, nation. In megacorp: +2 Social Limit, +2 Social Skill. In nation/sprawl: +1 Social Limit, +1 Social Skill. PA +5. Day Job: income x6, +10% workload.
rows.restrictions: Requires SINner or Rating 3 fake SIN.

rows.name: Fame (Global)
rows.description: +3 Social Limit, +3 Social Skill modifier to positively influence anyone who knows. PA +8. Day Job: income x10, +25% workload.
rows.restrictions: Requires SINner or Rating 3 fake SIN.

rows.name: Friends in High Places
rows.description: Additional Charisma x 4 Karma for contacts at creation. All contacts must have Connection Rating 8+. Leftover Karma lost. Cannot call on them constantly.
rows.restrictions: Character creation only. Connection Rating minimum 8.

rows.name: Hawk Eye
rows.description: +1 dice pool modifier to Perception Tests. Shift all Range Environmental modifiers up one category (e.g., Medium becomes Short).
rows.restrictions: Part of natural eyes. Incompatible with electronic vision enhancements and cyber-/bioware augmentations or replacements.

rows.name: Inspired
rows.description: +2 Street Cred among fellow artists. +1 dice pool modifier for all Artisan skills OR all Performance skills (choose one at purchase).
rows.restrictions: Can only be selected once. Category cannot be changed.

rows.name: Jack of All Trades, Master of None
rows.description: Karma costs for learning skills reduced by 1 (min 1) up to Rating 5. Beyond Rating 5, costs 2 additional Karma per point.
rows.restrictions: Does not apply during character creation.

rows.name: Lightning Reflexes
rows.description: +1 Initiative rating, +1 initiative die. +1 dice pool modifier for all Defense Tests. Not cumulative with any other Initiative enhancement (technological, chemical, magical).
rows.restrictions: Requires unaugmented character.

rows.name: Linguist
rows.description: Halve language learning time. +1 Language skill tests. At creation: Language skill points 2-for-1. Post-creation: ranks 3+ get 1 Karma reduction per rank.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Made Man
rows.description: Free Group Contact (crime syndicate). Loyalty 3. Fence at 30% value. Stolen/restricted goods: 10% discount, +1 Availability. Obligation: ~20 hrs/week syndicate work.
rows.restrictions: Must participate in syndicate work.

rows.name: Night Vision
rows.description: Grants low-light vision. Extremely light-sensitive: suffers increased Glare penalties (Blinding on clear day, Moderate on overcast). Mitigated by sunglasses.
rows.restrictions: Incompatible with cyber-/bioware augmentation or replacement. Quality lost if augmented (no Karma refund).

rows.name: Outdoorsman
rows.description: +2 dice pool modifier for all Outdoors skill group tests in rural/wild environments. -1 dice pool modifier to Perception and Survival Tests in urban environments.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Overclocker
rows.description: Add 1 point of Rating to one cyberdeck ASDF attribute. Can be reallocated when cyberdeck is reconfigured.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Perceptive
rows.description: 5 Karma: +1 dice pool modifier on all Perception Tests (including Astral and Matrix). 10 Karma: modifier increases to +2.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Perfect Time
rows.description: Always knows exact time. +1 dice pool modifier for Performance Tests involving timing/rhythm. One additional Free Action every Action Phase.
rows.restrictions: Obstructed by prolonged isolation, unconsciousness, drug/chip distortion, extended Matrix time.

rows.name: Poor Link
rows.description: -2 dice pool modifier for Ritual Spellcasting Test (Step 7: Seal the Ritual) for all rituals targeting the character. +2 dice pool modifier for Resistance Tests against rituals.
rows.restrictions: Affects ALL rituals including friendly ones.

rows.name: Privileged Family Name
rows.description: Real name carries clout in home sprawl. Get-out-of-jail-free for minor misdemeanors. Local minor NPCs suffer -2 Social tests against character.
rows.restrictions: Requires SINner (National or Corporate). Family name makes character easy to identify.

rows.name: Restricted Gear
rows.description: Per item. At creation: buy one piece with Availability up to 24. Post-creation: Availability up to 18 at +35% cost. Max 3 total; only 1 at creation.
rows.restrictions: Maximum 3 purchases. Only 1 at character creation.

rows.name: School of Hard Knocks
rows.description: At creation: buy Street Knowledge skills at 2-for-1. Post-creation: Street Knowledge ranks 3+ get 1 Karma cost reduction per rank.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Sense of Direction
rows.description: Always knows true north. Can retrace path and estimate distances accurately. +1 dice pool modifier on Navigation skill tests.
rows.restrictions: Must be alert and able to perceive surroundings.

rows.name: Sensei
rows.description: Teacher for one skill or skill group. Requires contact with Connection 3+. Single skill: Rating 13, Instruction 10, limit 7. Skill group: Rating 12, Instruction 12, limit 8. Free.
rows.restrictions: Must have contact with Connection Rating 3+.

rows.name: Solid/Legendary Rep
rows.description: Reputation within a specific group (1,000-5,000 members). Solid (2 Karma): +1 Rep. Legendary (4 Karma): +2 Rep.
rows.restrictions: Can only be taken once.

rows.name: Speed Reading
rows.description: Read ~800 words in ~5 seconds, 800-page book in ~1 hour. Not memorized. Locating specific info: Logic+Intuition Extended Test (GM sets threshold/interval).
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Spike Resistance
rows.description: +1 dice pool modifier per level to resist harmful biofeedback (black IC, dump shock, black hammer, etc.). Max Rating 3.
rows.restrictions: Maximum 3 levels.

rows.name: Spirit Whisperer
rows.description: Spirits add 1 die resisting Summoning from this character. If successful, spirit arrives at Force+1 (considered summoned at declared Force for all purposes).
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Steely Eyed Wheelman
rows.description: Vehicle Tests: Terrain Modifiers reduced by 1 (minimum 0).
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Technical School Education
rows.description: At creation: buy Professional Knowledge skills at 2-for-1. Post-creation: Professional Knowledge ranks 3+ get 1 Karma cost reduction per rank.
rows.restrictions: None listed.

rows.name: Tough as Nails
rows.description: Each level: +1 box to Physical or Stun Condition monitor. Max 4 levels total, max 3 boxes on any one monitor.
rows.restrictions: Maximum 4 levels. Maximum 3 additional boxes per Condition monitor.

cross_references.note: Functional mirror quality for urban vs wilderness
Functional mirror quality for wilderness vs urban
Speed Reading info is not memorized unless character also has Photographic Memory
Contact abuse rules apply to high-connection contacts
Glare penalties per Environmental Compensation Table
